today_trades.rationale: AFRM is displaying extreme multi-oscillator overbought confluence — the clearest mean-reversion short setup in today's scan. RSI = 90.5 (extreme, well above the 70 overbought threshold and nowhere near the 25 hard-stop RSI floor), Williams %R = -7.4 (OVERBOUGHT zone, above -20), Stochastic %K = 92.6 (OVERBOUGHT, and K is above D suggesting rollover risk), BB %B = 1.033 (ABOVE upper band). This is 4-of-4 oscillator overbought agreement — highest possible confluence signal per our framework. Regime is NEUTRAL (shorts permitted). No fundamental catalyst found in last 24h news scan justifying this extension — the run is purely technical momentum with no earnings, no M&A, no guidance raise. MACD is still positive but histogram narrowing. Short criteria met: (2) extreme technical overbought condition + (4) NEUTRAL regime allows shorts. Volume ratio was 2.82x previous hour = momentum crowd piling in at the top. With 5 existing long positions we have exactly 1 slot. IMPORTANT: AFRM is not on the banned ticker list. RSI 90.5 >> 25 (not a capitulation scenario). ATR = $0.747/share, 2.5x ATR stop = ~$1.87. Entry ~$60.82 (live ask). NOTE: We currently have 5 open long positions. Iron Law #2 prohibits shorting index ETFs while individual longs are open — AFRM is NOT an index ETF, this is permitted.

MSFT is exhibiting maximum multi-oscillator overbought exhaustion: RSI 86.5 (extreme), BB %B 1.12 (price ABOVE upper Bollinger Band — breakout or blow-off?), Stoch K/D both at 96/95 (K barely above D, no more upside momentum), Williams %R -3.7 (extreme overbought). With low volume ratio (0.06 live, 1.12 prev hour — not a high-volume breakout), the upper band extension with declining volume signals mean reversion rather than continued breakout. MACD is positive but histogram softening. Analyst price target $500 already published today = 'buy the news' event, no fresh upside catalyst. VIX at 20 provides macro short permission per rules. SPY itself is overbought (RSI 73.1, MACD hist slightly negative). Trump/Powell risk creates uncertainty overhang. 3 of 4 SHORT criteria met: (1) VIX=20 macro catalyst, (2) RSI 86.5 + BB above upper band = technical breakdown setup, (4) NEUTRAL regime permits shorts. HOWEVER: portfolio is AT MAX 6 positions. This is a CONDITIONAL entry — only executable once a bracket clears one of the 6 current positions. Flag for immediate execution on next position exit.
